## Description

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component or feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's lint and typecheck rules (`npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`).
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests and they pass (`npm run test`).
- [ ] I have updated Storybook stories if I changed a component.
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG (for user-facing changes).
- [ ] Docs/README updated if needed.

## Related issues

Fixes #(issue number) (if applicable).
